    SELECT 1990 AS anoDisplay, 1990 as anoValue
    UNION ALL
    SELECT anoDisplay + 1, anoValue + 1
    FROM Anos
    WHERE anoValue < year(getdate())

FROM Anos
order by anoValue desc

DECLARE @Ano INT = {anocompra}; -- Ano que pretendes analisar
DECLARE @MesInicio   INT = {mesinicio};      -- Mês de início  (ex: Março  = 3)
DECLARE @MesFim      INT = {mesfim};      -- Mês de fim     (ex: Agosto = 8)


;WITH MesesCanva AS
(
    SELECT 1  AS Mes UNION ALL SELECT 2  UNION ALL SELECT 3  UNION ALL
    SELECT 4  UNION ALL        SELECT 5  UNION ALL SELECT 6  UNION ALL
    SELECT 7  UNION ALL        SELECT 8  UNION ALL SELECT 9  UNION ALL
    SELECT 10 UNION ALL        SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12
),
-- Faturação isolada com os filtros correctos
FaturacaoBruta AS
(
    SELECT
        MONTH(ft.fdata) AS mes,
        YEAR(ft.fdata)  AS ano,
        ft.ivain1 + ft.ivain2 + ft.ivain3 + ft.ivain4 + ft.ivain5 +
        ft.ivain6 + ft.ivain7 + ft.ivain8 + ft.ivain9 AS total
    FROM ft (NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN td (NOLOCK)
           ON ft.ndoc      = td.ndoc
          AND td.regrd     = 0
          AND td.tiposaft NOT IN ('FC', 'CC')
    WHERE ft.anulado  = 0
      AND ft.fno     >= 0
      AND ft.tipodoc IN (1, 3)
      AND YEAR(ft.fdata)  IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND MONTH(ft.fdata) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
),
Faturacao AS
(
    SELECT
        MC.Mes,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN F.ano = @Ano     THEN F.total END), 0) AS acumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN F.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN F.total END), 0) AS acumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN F.ano = @Ano     AND F.mes = @MesFim THEN F.total END), 0) AS mensal,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN F.ano = @Ano - 1 AND F.mes = @MesFim THEN F.total END), 0) AS mensalAnterior
    FROM MesesCanva MC
    LEFT JOIN FaturacaoBruta F ON F.mes = MC.Mes
    GROUP BY MC.Mes
),
-- Rentabilidade isolada com os filtros correctos
CustosBruto AS
(
    SELECT
        MONTH(ft.fdata) AS mes,
        YEAR(ft.fdata)  AS ano,
        custo
    FROM ft (NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN td (NOLOCK)
           ON ft.ndoc      = td.ndoc
          AND td.regrd     = 0
          AND td.tiposaft NOT IN ('FC', 'CC')
    WHERE ft.anulado  = 0
      AND ft.fno     >= 0
      AND ft.tipodoc IN (1, 3)
      AND YEAR(ft.fdata)  IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND MONTH(ft.fdata) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
),
Custos AS
(
    SELECT
        MC.Mes,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN CST.ano = @Ano     THEN CST.custo END), 0) AS acumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN CST.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN CST.custo END), 0) AS acumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN CST.ano = @Ano     AND CST.mes = @MesFim THEN CST.custo END), 0) AS mensal,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN CST.ano = @Ano - 1 AND CST.mes = @MesFim THEN CST.custo END), 0) AS mensalAnterior
    FROM MesesCanva MC
    LEFT JOIN CustosBruto CST ON CST.mes = MC.Mes
    GROUP BY MC.Mes
),
Rentabilidade AS
(
    SELECT
        CT.Mes,
        ISNULL(F.acumuladoAno-CT.acumuladoAno, 0) AS acumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(F.acumuladoAnoAnterior-CT.acumuladoAnoAnterior, 0) AS acumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(F.mensal-CT.mensal, 0) AS mensal,
        ISNULL(F.mensalAnterior-CT.mensalAnterior, 0) AS mensalAnterior
    FROM Custos CT
    INNER JOIN Faturacao F ON CT.mes = F.Mes
   
),
-- Compras isolada
ComprasBruta AS
(
    SELECT
        MONTH(fo.data) AS mes,
        YEAR(fo.data)  AS ano,
        CASE WHEN cm1.debito = 1 THEN -fo.ivain ELSE fo.ivain END AS total
    FROM fo
    INNER JOIN fo2 (NOLOCK) ON fo2.fo2stamp = fo.fostamp AND fo2.anulado = 0
    INNER JOIN cm1 (NOLOCK) ON cm1.cm = fo.doccode AND cm1.foextra = 0
    WHERE YEAR(fo.data)  IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND MONTH(fo.data) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
),
Compras AS
(
    SELECT
        MC.Mes,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.ano = @Ano     THEN C.total END), 0) AS acumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN C.total END), 0) AS acumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.ano = @Ano     AND C.mes = @MesFim THEN C.total END), 0) AS mensal,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.ano = @Ano - 1 AND C.mes = @MesFim THEN C.total END), 0) AS mensalAnterior
    FROM MesesCanva MC
    LEFT JOIN ComprasBruta C ON C.mes = MC.Mes
    GROUP BY MC.Mes
),
-- Tesouraria isolada
TesourariaBruta AS
(
    SELECT
        MONTH(ol.data) AS mes,
        YEAR(ol.data)  AS ano,
        ol.entr,
        ol.said
    FROM ol
    WHERE YEAR(ol.data)  IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND ol.transf      = 0
      AND MONTH(ol.data) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
),
Tesouraria AS
(
    SELECT
        MC.Mes,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano     THEN T.entr END), 0) AS recAcumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN T.entr END), 0) AS recAcumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano     AND T.mes = @MesFim THEN T.entr END), 0) AS recMensal,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano - 1 AND T.mes = @MesFim THEN T.entr END), 0) AS recMensalAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano     THEN T.said END), 0) AS pagAcumuladoAno,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN T.said END), 0) AS pagAcumuladoAnoAnterior,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano     AND T.mes = @MesFim THEN T.said END), 0) AS pagMensal,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.ano = @Ano - 1 AND T.mes = @MesFim THEN T.said END), 0) AS pagMensalAnterior
    FROM MesesCanva MC
    LEFT JOIN TesourariaBruta T ON T.mes = MC.Mes
    GROUP BY MC.Mes
)

SELECT Agrupador,
       Indicador,
       ordem,
       mes,
       mesIni=@MesInicio,
       mesFim=@MesFim,
       SUM(acumuladoAno) AS acumuladoAno,
       SUM(mensal) AS mensal,
       SUM(acumuladoAnoAnterior) AS acumuladoAnoAnterior,
       SUM(mensalAnterior) AS mensalAnterior
FROM (
    SELECT 'Facturação' AS Agrupador, 'Facturação'     AS Indicador, 0 AS ordem,mes,
           acumuladoAno, mensal, acumuladoAnoAnterior, mensalAnterior
    FROM Faturacao
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Facturação', 'Rentabilidade', 1,mes,
           acumuladoAno, mensal, acumuladoAnoAnterior, mensalAnterior
    FROM Rentabilidade
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Compras',   'Compras',       2,mes,
           acumuladoAno, mensal, acumuladoAnoAnterior, mensalAnterior
    FROM Compras
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Tesouraria','Recebimentos',  3,mes,
           recAcumuladoAno, recMensal, recAcumuladoAnoAnterior, recMensalAnterior
    FROM Tesouraria
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Tesouraria','Pagamentos',    4,mes,
           pagAcumuladoAno, pagMensal, pagAcumuladoAnoAnterior, pagMensalAnterior
    FROM Tesouraria
) Tabela 
group by Agrupador, Indicador, ordem, mes
order by ordem asc

DECLARE @Ano INT = {anocompra};
DECLARE @FornecedorId INT = {fornecedor};
DECLARE @MesInicio INT = {mesinicio};
DECLARE @MesFim INT = {mesfim};
DECLARE @AteaData   INT = {acumulaObj};

;WITH MesesCanva AS
(
    SELECT 1 AS Mes UNION ALL
    SELECT 2 UNION ALL
    SELECT 3 UNION ALL
    SELECT 4 UNION ALL
    SELECT 5 UNION ALL
    SELECT 6 UNION ALL
    SELECT 7 UNION ALL
    SELECT 8 UNION ALL
    SELECT 9 UNION ALL
    SELECT 10 UNION ALL
    SELECT 11 UNION ALL
    SELECT 12
),
Objectivos AS
(
    SELECT
        mes,
        ano,
        valor=sum(valor)
    FROM ov
    WHERE ano IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1) and segmento='Distribuição'
    group by mes,ano
),
Meses AS(

SELECT
    MC.Mes,
    ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN O.ano = @Ano     THEN O.valor END), 0) AS ObjectivoAnoActual,
    ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN O.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN O.valor END), 0) AS ObjectivoAnoAnterior
FROM MesesCanva MC
LEFT JOIN Objectivos O
       ON O.mes = MC.mes
    AND (
        -- Quando AteaData = 1, filtra objectivos só pelo intervalo de meses
        -- Quando AteaData = 0, traz objectivos de todos os meses
        @AteaData = 0
        OR MC.Mes BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
    )
GROUP BY MC.Mes)

SELECT
    M.Mes,
    M.ObjectivoAnoActual,
    M.ObjectivoAnoAnterior,
    ComprasAnoActual =
        ISNULL(
            SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN YEAR(F.data) = @Ano
                    THEN CASE
                             WHEN cm1.debito = 1
                             THEN -F.ivain
                             ELSE F.ivain
                         END
                END
            ),0
        ),

    ComprasAnoAnterior =
        ISNULL(
            SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN YEAR(F.data) = @Ano - 1
                    THEN CASE
                             WHEN cm1.debito = 1
                             THEN -F.ivain
                             ELSE F.ivain
                         END
                END
            ),0
        )

FROM Meses M
LEFT JOIN fo F
       ON MONTH(F.data) = M.Mes
      AND YEAR(F.data) IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND (@FornecedorId = 0 OR F.no = @FornecedorId)
      AND  month(f.data) between @MesInicio and @Mesfim 

LEFT JOIN fo2
       ON fo2.fo2stamp = F.fostamp
      AND fo2.anulado = 0

LEFT JOIN cm1
       ON cm1.cm = F.doccode
      AND cm1.foextra = 0
GROUP BY
    M.Mes,
    M.ObjectivoAnoActual,
    M.ObjectivoAnoAnterior

DECLARE @Ano INT = {anocompra};
DECLARE @ClienteId INT = {cliente};
DECLARE @MesInicio INT = {mesinicio};
DECLARE @MesFim INT = {mesfim};
DECLARE @AteaData   INT = {acumulaObjVendas};
DECLARE @CentroAnalitico   VARCHAR(MAX) = '{CentroA}';

;WITH MesesCanva AS
(
    SELECT 1  AS Mes UNION ALL SELECT 2  UNION ALL SELECT 3  UNION ALL
    SELECT 4  UNION ALL        SELECT 5  UNION ALL SELECT 6  UNION ALL
    SELECT 7  UNION ALL        SELECT 8  UNION ALL SELECT 9  UNION ALL
    SELECT 10 UNION ALL        SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12
),
Objectivos AS
(
    SELECT
        mes,
        ano,
        valor = SUM(valor)
    FROM ov
    WHERE ano IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND segmento = 'Directo' AND (@ClienteId = 0 OR ov.no = @ClienteId)
    GROUP BY mes, ano
),
Meses AS
(
    SELECT
        MC.Mes,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN O.ano = @Ano     THEN O.valor END), 0) AS ObjectivoAnoActual,
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN O.ano = @Ano - 1 THEN O.valor END), 0) AS ObjectivoAnoAnterior
    FROM MesesCanva MC
    LEFT JOIN Objectivos O
           ON O.mes = MC.mes
          AND (
                @AteaData = 0
                OR MC.Mes BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
              )
    GROUP BY MC.Mes
),
Faturacao AS
(
    -- Filtros do WHERE movidos para dentro da CTE
    -- assim o LEFT JOIN em Meses não perde os meses sem faturação
    SELECT ft.fdata,ft.fno,sum(tiliquido) as totalfatura
    FROM fi
    INNER JOIN ft on ft.ftstamp=fi.ftstamp
    LEFT JOIN td (NOLOCK)
           ON ft.ndoc   = td.ndoc
          AND td.regrd  = 0
          AND td.tiposaft NOT IN ('FC', 'CC')   -- <-- condição do td movida para o ON
    WHERE ft.anulado  = 0
      AND ft.fno   >= 0
      AND ft.tipodoc IN (1, 3)
      AND YEAR(ft.fdata)    IN (@Ano, @Ano - 1)
      AND MONTH(ft.fdata)   BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
      AND (@ClienteId = 0 OR ft.no = @ClienteId)
      AND (@CentroAnalitico = '' OR fi.ficcusto IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CentroAnalitico, ',')))
    GROUP BY ft.fdata,ft.fno,ficcusto
            

)

SELECT
    @Ano as AnoActual,
    @Ano-1 as AnoAnterior,
    @mesfim as mesfim,
    M.Mes,
    M.ObjectivoAnoActual,
    M.ObjectivoAnoAnterior,
    FaturaçãoAnoActual =
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(F.fdata) = @Ano     THEN F.totalfatura END), 0),
    FaturaçãoAnoAnterior =
        ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(F.fdata) = @Ano - 1 THEN F.totalfatura END), 0)

FROM Meses M
LEFT JOIN Faturacao F
       ON MONTH(F.fdata) = M.Mes

GROUP BY
    M.Mes,
    M.ObjectivoAnoActual,
    M.ObjectivoAnoAnterior

ORDER BY M.Mes

DECLARE @Ano INT = {anocompra};
DECLARE @MesInicio INT = {mesinicio};
DECLARE @MesFim INT = {mesfim};

;WITH Contas as
(
select      
        1 as indicador, SUM((deb-debf)-(cred-credf)+difcambio) as total
from cc (nolock) 
where cc.incobra=0 and year(datalc)=@Ano and month(datalc) between @MesInicio and @MesFim

union all

select  2, SUM((cred - credf) - (deb - debf))
from fc
where year(datalc)=@Ano and month(datalc) between @MesInicio and @MesFim

union all

select  3, ISNULL(sum(saldo),0) 
from bl
where year(datasaldo)=@Ano and month(datasaldo) between @MesInicio and @MesFim

union all

select  4, ISNULL(sum(stock*pcpond),0) 
from sa
)

select 
        SUM(C) as Clientes, 
        SUM(F) as Fornecedores, 
        SUM(B) as Bancos,
        SUM(S) as Stock,
        (SUM(C)+SUM(B)+SUM(S))-SUM(F) as Liquido
from
(select 
    case when indicador=1 then total else 0 end as C,
    case when indicador=2 then total else 0 end as F,
    case when indicador=3 then total else 0 end as B,
    case when indicador=4 then total else 0 end as S
from Contas)tmp

DECLARE @Ano INT = {anocompra};
DECLARE @MesInicio INT = {mesinicio};
DECLARE @MesFim INT = {mesfim};

IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM ft
    WHERE YEAR(fdata) = @Ano
      AND MONTH(fdata) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
)
BEGIN
        Select top 10 total,
              CASE 
                WHEN total >= 1000000000 THEN nome+'-'+FORMAT(total / 1000000000, 'N1') + 'B'
                WHEN total >= 1000000 THEN nome+' - '+FORMAT(total / 1000000, 'N1') + 'M'
                WHEN total >= 1000 THEN nome+' - '+FORMAT(total / 1000, 'N1') + 'K'
                ELSE FORMAT(total, 'N0')
              END AS nome2,nome,
           CAST(total*100.0/SUM(total) OVER() as DECIMAL(10,2)) as percentagem,
           subtitulo=FORMAT(total, 'N2')+'   - '+CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(total*100.0/SUM(total) OVER() as DECIMAL(10,2)))+'%'
        from
            (SELECT
                ft.no, trim(ft.nome) as nome,
                SUM(ft.ivain1 + ft.ivain2 + ft.ivain3 + ft.ivain4 + ft.ivain5 +
                ft.ivain6 + ft.ivain7 + ft.ivain8 + ft.ivain9) AS total
            FROM ft (NOLOCK)
            INNER JOIN td (NOLOCK)
                   ON ft.ndoc      = td.ndoc
                  AND td.regrd     = 0
                  AND td.tiposaft NOT IN ('FC', 'CC')
            WHERE ft.anulado  = 0
              AND ft.fno     >= 0
              AND ft.tipodoc IN (1, 3)
              AND YEAR(ft.fdata)  IN (@Ano)
              AND MONTH(ft.fdata) BETWEEN @MesInicio AND @MesFim
         group by ft.no, ft.nome)tabela
         order by total desc
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    SELECT
        nome = 'Sem resultados para este filtro',
        nome2 = 'Sem resultados para este filtro',
        total = 0,
        percentagem = 0,
        subtitulo = '0,00 - 0%'
END

DECLARE @DataInicio DATE = {datainicio};
DECLARE @DataFim DATE = {datafim};
DECLARE @TecnicoID INT={tecnico};
DECLARE @Equipa VARCHAR(50)='{equipa}';


select userno, username, 
sum(fdentro) as fdentro,
sum(adentro) as adentro,
sum(ffora) as ffora,
sum(afora) as afora,
count(*) as pats,
sum(reaberto) as reabertos
from get_pats2()
where data between @DataInicio and @DataFim
AND (@TecnicoID = 0 OR userno = @TecnicoID)
AND (@Equipa = 'Todas' OR equipa = @Equipa)
group by userno, username

 UNION ALL

 select 0 as userno,
		'' as username,
		0 as fdentro,
		0 as adentro,
		0 as ffora,
		0 as afora,
		0 as pats,
		0 as reabertos


WHERE NOT EXISTS (
	select userno, username, 
sum(fdentro) as fdentro,
sum(adentro) as adentro,
sum(ffora) as ffora,
sum(afora) as afora,
count(*) as pats,
sum(reaberto) as reabertos
from get_pats2()
where data between @DataInicio and @DataFim
AND (@TecnicoID = 0 OR userno = @TecnicoID)
AND (@Equipa = 'Todas' OR equipa = @Equipa)
group by userno, username
);

DECLARE @DataInicio DATE = {datainicio};
DECLARE @DataFim DATE = {datafim};
DECLARE @TecnicoID INT={tecnico};
DECLARE @Equipa VARCHAR(50)='{equipa}';

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN TempoMinutos < 60    THEN CAST(TempoMinutos AS VARCHAR) + ' min'
        WHEN TempoMinutos < 1440  THEN CAST(TempoMinutos / 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'h ' +
                                       CAST(TempoMinutos % 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'min'
        ELSE                           CAST(TempoMinutos / 1440 AS VARCHAR) + 'd ' +
                                       CAST((TempoMinutos % 1440) / 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'h'
    END AS TempoResposta,
    CASE
        WHEN MediaMinutos < 60    THEN CAST(MediaMinutos AS VARCHAR) + ' min'
        WHEN MediaMinutos < 1440  THEN CAST(MediaMinutos / 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'h ' +
                                       CAST(MediaMinutos % 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'min'
        ELSE                           CAST(MediaMinutos / 1440 AS VARCHAR) + 'd ' +
                                       CAST((MediaMinutos % 1440) / 60 AS VARCHAR) + 'h'
    END AS TempoMedioResposta,
    *
FROM
(
    SELECT
        DATEDIFF(MINUTE, PaTime, ITTime)              AS TempoMinutos,
        AVG(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, PaTime, ITTime)) OVER () AS MediaMinutos,
        *
    FROM GET_TEMPO_ESPERA_PA()
    where nopat>0 and pdata between @DataInicio and @DataFim 
AND (@TecnicoID = 0 OR userno = @TecnicoID)
AND (@Equipa = 'Todas' OR equipa = @Equipa)
) tmp


UNION ALL

select 'Sem Dados Para este Filtro' as TempoResposta,
       'Sem Dados Para este Filtro' as TempoMedioResposta,
       0 as TempoMinutos,
       0 as MediaMinutos,
       getdate() as ITTime,
       getdate() AS PaTime,
       0 AS nopat,
       'Sem Dados Para este Filtro' AS username,
       getdate() as pdata,
       0 as userno,
       'Sem Dados Para este Filtro' as equipa
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
        DATEDIFF(MINUTE, PaTime, ITTime)              AS TempoMinutos,
        AVG(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, PaTime, ITTime)) OVER () AS MediaMinutos,
        *

DECLARE @DataInicio DATE = {datainicio};
DECLARE @DataFim DATE = {datafim};
DECLARE @TecnicoID INT={tecnico};
DECLARE @Equipa VARCHAR(50)='{equipa}';

DECLARE @Dias INT = DATEDIFF(DAY, @DataInicio, @DataFim);

SELECT
    case when @TecnicoID>0 
    then isnull((select u_teamlead from us where userno = @TecnicoID),0)
    else 0 end as teamlead,
    case when @TecnicoID>0 
    then isnull((select u_tpogrupo from us where userno = @TecnicoID),'')
    else '' end as leadgroup,
    periodo = CASE 
                  WHEN @Dias >= 365 
                      THEN CAST(YEAR(data) AS VARCHAR(4))
                  WHEN @Dias < 31 
                      THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'dd-', 'pt-PT') +
                            UPPER(LEFT(FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'MMM', 'pt-PT'), 1)) +
                            LOWER(SUBSTRING(FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'MMM', 'pt-PT'), 2, 2))
                  ELSE UPPER(LEFT(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT'), 1)) + SUBSTRING(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT'), 2, LEN(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT')))
              END,
    ocpesp        = SUM(ocpesp),
    ocpmh         = SUM(ocpmh),
    ocptda        = SUM(ocptda),
    ocpmx         = SUM(ocpmx),
    ftmh          = SUM(ftmh),
    fttda         = SUM(fttda),
    ftmx          = SUM(ftmx),
    pats          = SUM(pats),
    dentro        = SUM(dentro),
    reabertos     = SUM(reabertos),
    npsdiff       = SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), npsdiff)),
    patsclassif   = SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), patsclassif)),
    
    p_ocpmh = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2),ocpmh))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ocptda = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocptda))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ocpmx  = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpmx))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ocp = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpmh + ocptda + ocpmx))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ocp_target = 80,

    p_ftmh = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ftmh))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_fttda = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), fttda))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ftmx  = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ftmx))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ft = CASE WHEN SUM(ocpesp) IS NULL OR SUM(ocpesp) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ftmh + fttda + ftmx))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), ocpesp)), 2) END,
    p_ft_target = 55,

    p_dentro = CASE WHEN SUM(pats) IS NULL OR SUM(pats) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), dentro))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), pats)), 2) END,
    p_dentro_target = 95,
    p_reabertos = CASE WHEN SUM(pats) IS NULL OR SUM(pats) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), reabertos))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), pats)), 2) END,
    p_reabertos_target = 5,
    p_nps = CASE WHEN SUM(patsclassif) IS NULL OR SUM(patsclassif) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100 * SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), npsdiff))/ SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC(6,2), patsclassif)), 2) END,
    p_nps_target = 100,
    nota_mh = convert(numeric(6,2), 0), nota_tda = convert(numeric(6,2), 0), nota_mx = convert(numeric(6,2), 0), 
    nota = convert(numeric(6,2), 0),
    p_nota_target = 10

FROM fn_get_diario()
WHERE inactivo = 0 
  AND data BETWEEN @DataInicio AND @DataFim
  AND (@TecnicoID = 0 OR userno = @TecnicoID)
  AND (@Equipa = 'Todas' OR equipa = @Equipa)

  
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
                  WHEN @Dias >= 365 
                      THEN CAST(YEAR(data) AS VARCHAR(4))
                  WHEN @Dias < 31 
                      THEN FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'dd-', 'pt-PT') +
                            UPPER(LEFT(FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'MMM', 'pt-PT'), 1)) +
                            LOWER(SUBSTRING(FORMAT(DATEADD(WEEK, DATEDIFF(WEEK, 0, data), 0), 'MMM', 'pt-PT'), 2, 2))
                  ELSE UPPER(LEFT(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT'), 1)) + SUBSTRING(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT'), 2, LEN(FORMAT(data, 'MMM-yyyy', 'pt-PT')))
              END

ORDER BY 
    MIN(data);
